zh.lifeSummary: 當John Darcy於1406年11月13日之前出生在英國英格蘭越可爾坦普爾 赫斯特時，他的父親Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth29歲，母親Margaret Grey28歲。他於1423年與Joan Greystoke在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1458年4月27日在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Darcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

variants.name: Darcey
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Darcy  .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John Darcy was born before 13 November 1406, in Temple Hirst, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth, was 29 and his mother, Margaret Grey, was 28. He married Joan Greystoke in 1423, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 27 April 1458, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Darcy est né avant 13 novembre 1406, à Temple Hirst, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret Grey, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Joan Greystoke en 1423, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 27 avril 1458, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1423 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Greystoke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 27. April 1458 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Joan Greystoke nel 1423, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 27 aprile 1458, nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Darcyが1406年11月13日以前にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアテンプル ヒルストで生まれた時，父Lord John D'Arcy of Knaythは29歳，母Margaret Greyは28歳であった。1423年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでJoan Greystokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1458年4月27日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Darcy(이)가 1406년 11월 13일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 템일 허스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Grey(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1423년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Joan Greystoke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1458년 4월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Darcy родился перед 13 ноябрь 1406 г. в местности темпл хирст, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord John D'Arcy of Knayth было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Grey, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Greystoke в 1423 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 27 апреля 1458 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
